svg.title: Spreadsheet-Native Inventory Sheet

g.text: March pilot artboard based on InventorySheetPilotSurface after the width-discipline hardening pass, with Intake adjacency and governed adjustments kept explicit.
Only the highest-yield browse columns stay visible. Deeper batch context and Intake adjacency move into linked support below.

svg.text: One main inventory table keeps SKU, product context, status, quantity, and age visible without forcing a wide default grid.
100 loaded rows out of 264 filtered rows · 5 saved views · quantity changes remain explicit, permission-gated actions.
Supporting table keeps storage context inline so the sheet can answer the next question without pushing routine work into the inspector.
Warehouse A / Rack 3 / Shelf B / Bin 4

g.text: Selected BD-3.5 · 100 loaded rows of 264 · 5 saved views
Primary actions stay in the command strip; Intake remains adjacent and quantity changes stay permission- and audit-gated.
